title: nepeta subsessilis
intro: Nepeta subsessilis, also known as Chinese catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta subsessilis include relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as an antibacterial agent to combat infections. Nepeta subsessilis can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
